articles.title: ‘We are in the midst of winter versus spring here’: Ski resorts are closing operations, reducing lift prices, limiting lifts
articles.description:
Ski areas in Massachusetts and Vermont closed operations completely on Thursday.

The post ‘We are in the midst of winter versus spring here’: Ski resorts are closing operations, reducing lift prices, limiting lifts appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Ski resorts in Massachusetts and Vermont closed operations completely on March 12.
Lift prices have been reduced as resorts limit available lifts.
Boston residents face fewer skiing options as winter transitions to spring.

articles.title: Ask the Gardener: With nothing else on the menu, rabbits eat the bark off your flowering plants
articles.description:
Woody plants with thicker bark, thorns, or fragrant bark may deter rabbits initially, but hunger will drive them to nibble just about anything to survive.

The post Ask the Gardener: With nothing else on the menu, rabbits eat the bark off your flowering plants appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Rabbits are increasingly damaging flowering plants in Boston due to food scarcity.
Woody plants with thicker bark may deter rabbits temporarily but are not foolproof.
Residents may need to protect their gardens to prevent significant plant damage.

articles.title: Two officers rescue woman found asleep amid house fire in Merrimac
articles.description:
A resident called 911 after seeing heavy smoke and flames coming from a home in Merrimac early Wednesday morning.

The post Two officers rescue woman found asleep amid house fire in Merrimac appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Two officers rescued a woman found asleep during a house fire in Merrimac.
The fire was reported early Wednesday morning, prompting a swift emergency response.
Residents are reminded of fire safety measures following this dangerous incident.

articles.title: A 22-year-old man died in a three-car crash in Canton
articles.description:
The police are still investigating the cause of the crash.

The post A 22-year-old man died in a three-car crash in Canton appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 22-year-old man died in a three-car crash in Canton.
The crash is under investigation by local police.
Residents are urged to drive cautiously in the area.

articles.title: Home of the Week: A $662,000 Cape Cod condo in an over-55 community
articles.description:
This three-bedroom, three-bath unit is part of an over-55 community off a golf course in Mashpee.

The post Home of the Week: A $662,000 Cape Cod condo in an over-55 community appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Explore a $662,000 three-bedroom condo in Mashpee's over-55 community.
Unit features three baths and is located near a golf course.
Potential appeal for Boston residents seeking retirement living options.

articles.title: Baby boomers feeling crushed by housing crunch
articles.description:
Instead of finding a safety net, a wealth gap means that many are unable to afford to pay rent.

The post Baby boomers feeling crushed by housing crunch appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Baby boomers in Boston face significant housing affordability challenges amid rising rents.
Many boomers lack financial safety nets, exacerbating the wealth gap in the community.
Increased housing costs threaten the stability of older residents, impacting local neighborhoods.

articles.title: You can now pass through TSA PreCheck at Logan using only your face. Should that make us nervous?
articles.description:
To some electronic privacy and civil liberties advocates, TSA’s facial recognition expansion comes as more of a dystopian omen than a cutting-edge marvel. 

The post You can now pass through TSA PreCheck at Logan using only your face. Should that make us nervous? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Logan Airport now offers facial recognition for TSA PreCheck, enhancing travel efficiency.
Privacy advocates express concerns over the expansion of facial recognition technology.
Boston residents may face increased surveillance and privacy issues at the airport.
